nml_option.name: config_AM_seaiceVcoarsen_enable
nml_option.description: If true, sea ice analysis member seaiceVcoarsen is called.

nml_option.name: config_AM_seaiceVcoarsen_compute_interval
nml_option.description: Timestamp determining how often analysis member computation should be performed.

nml_option.name: config_AM_seaiceVcoarsen_output_stream
nml_option.description: Name of the stream that the seaiceVcoarsen analysis member should be tied to.

nml_option.name: config_AM_seaiceVcoarsen_compute_on_startup
nml_option.description: Logical flag determining if an analysis member computation occurs on start-up.

nml_option.name: config_AM_seaiceVcoarsen_write_on_startup
nml_option.description: Logical flag determining if an analysis member write occurs on start-up.

package.name: seaiceVcoarsenAMPKG
package.description: This package includes variables required for the seaiceVcoarsen analysis member.

var.name: iceAreaTotal
var.description: Total ice area fraction (sum over categories)

var.name: iceVolumeTotal
var.description: Total ice volume per unit area (sum over categories)

var.name: snowVolumeTotal
var.description: Total snow volume per unit area (sum over categories)

var.name: iceThicknessMean
var.description: Mean ice thickness (total volume / total area)

var.name: surfaceTemperatureMean
var.description: Area-weighted mean surface temperature across categories
